name: G WARRIOR
short_description: G WARRIOR is a retro hardcore action shooting game. Pick up the gun and destroy all robots and aliens. Fight in colorful scenes such as snowy mountains, caves, seas of fire, alien lairs, etc.! !
detailed_description:
G Warrior is a retro hardcore action shooting game. Pick up the gun in your hand and destroy all the robots and aliens. Fight in colorful scenes such as snowy mountains, caves, seas of fire, alien lairs, etc.! !

feature:
– Takes you back to the nostalgic retro pixel style of the 1990s.
– Pick up weapons and rush, jump, exciting adventures are waiting for you!
– A variety of weapons and skills, such as lasers, shields, shotguns, charged energy cannons, flames, etc., to defeat various bosses and avoid their attacks perfectly
– The music is also in retro 8bit style! !

QQ QUN：884611138
